name: Generic CLI Agent Example Runtime Profile
used_for: AI judgement input, not fixed routing
external_dir_config: check the specific runtime's directory and instruction loading behavior
known_strengths: portable Markdown and JSON instruction shape
can use thin AgentPal project binding when the runtime follows AGENTS.md
works as a conservative fallback profile for unknown CLI runtimes
known_limits: file and command capabilities need current evidence
Claude Code local settings do not apply automatically
risk_notes: do not assume external directory access
do not assume Skill, plugin, or MCP support
refresh_policy: manual review for each specific CLI runtime
